name: Torii SaaS Management API
what_it_does: SaaS management and IT automation platform with REST API — discovering shadow IT applications, tracking SaaS licenses and utilization, automating IT workflows (onboarding/offboarding), managing renewals, and providing spend analytics to help IT teams control SaaS sprawl and reduce costs.
use_cases: Querying discovered SaaS application inventory including shadow IT detection
Monitoring license utilization thresholds for automated reclamation workflows
Integrating Torii offboarding workflows with HR systems for automated deprovisioning
Pulling SaaS renewal calendar for IT procurement budget planning
Automating new employee SaaS provisioning based on role templates via API
not_for: Cloud IaaS cost optimization (use Vantage or CloudCheckr)
Security-focused SaaS risk management (use Grip Security or AppOmni)
best_when: An IT team wants to discover all SaaS applications including shadow IT, automate employee onboarding/offboarding across SaaS tools, manage renewals, and optimize license spend — especially in fast-growing companies with SaaS sprawl.
avoid_when: You need cloud infrastructure cost management, on-prem license compliance, or deep security risk assessment of SaaS applications.

auth.notes: API key from Torii account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for application discovery, utilization alerts, and renewal events. SSO (Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace) and expense integrations for discovery. No OAuth2 for primary API.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee pricing; contact sales for tiers
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2018. Raised $50M Series B (2022). Backed by Tiger Global, Wing VC. IT automation differentiator — workflow builder for onboarding/offboarding automation. Shadow IT discovery via SSO and expense parsing. Torii Workflows: no-code automation for IT processes. Popular with hypergrowth startups and mid-market tech companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for applications, users, licenses, and workflows. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. SSO and expense integrations configured in admin. Workflow automation built in Torii UI — API triggers available for workflows. Employee deprovisioning workflows require integration configuration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Application reads fully idempotent. User reads idempotent. License reads idempotent. Workflow trigger status reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: SSO integration required for application discovery and user access mapping
Workflow automation built in Torii UI — API only triggers pre-configured workflows
Employee deprovisioning requires all app integrations configured before automation
Shadow IT discovery accuracy depends on SSO coverage and expense parsing
Annual contract — significant commitment for onboarding/offboarding automation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001 compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Employee identity data and SaaS access is highly sensitive — restrict API access. Offboarding automation has account deletion consequences — implement safeguards. Israeli company with strong enterprise security certifications.
